title: pyserep: SEREP-Based Reduced Order Modelling for Large-Scale Structural Dynamics Problems
description: pyserep is a Python library implementing the System Equivalent Reduction Expansion Process (SEREP) for model order reduction of large-scale structural dynamics finite element models. It provides exact eigenvalue preservation, direct FRF computation via impedance inversion (Z(omega)^-1), Effective Independence DOF selection (DS4), selective non-contiguous frequency band analysis, sensitivity analysis, Monte Carlo uncertainty quantification, and a complete validation suite. Validated on the Garteur SM-AG19 benchmark structure (66,525 DOFs reduced to 37 master DOFs with maximum eigenvalue error of 7e-7%). Requires real symmetric positive semi-definite stiffness and positive definite mass matrices.
